2128060.name: Zeltoid X1
2128060.description:
In Zeltoid X1 you play as a engineer robot named Zeltoid. You will need to
help your planet and travel across the galaxy to find the essential energy
to robotic life, the zitoride.

You will be able to create new abilities to help you in your quest and solve
strange puzzles along your journey. To create new abilities, you will have to
look for necessary materials in asteroids and other planets.

Ultimately, you will need to find the reason for the mysterious disappearance
of the zitoride in the galaxy.



  • Explore the galaxy with your spaceship
  • Destroy asteroids and other objects to collect essential parts
  • Craft new abilities for your robot
  • Collect zitoride by searching all over the galaxy
  • Solve strange puzzles
  • Find the reason for the mysterious disappearance of zitoride around the galaxy.
